projects.name: ClipMantra
projects.description: AI-Powered Long-Form Video to Viral Clips Automation Platform. Engineered an AI-powered platform that converts long-form videos into viral-ready short clips.
features: Orchestrated an async media pipeline using Node.js, Redis, PostgreSQL, yt-dlp for video acquisition, FFmpeg for clip processing, and Faster-Whisper for transcription, with real-time processing updates.
Configured JWT + Google OAuth authentication, Redis-based rate limiting, and secure user-level data isolation.
Streamlined scalable cloud storage workflows using AWS S3 and Cloudflare R2 with automated media cleanup.

projects.name: Notes-Era
projects.description: Premium Engineering Notes Platform. Spearheaded end-to-end UI/UX in Figma and backend development using Node.js (TypeScript) and MongoDB, serving 5,000+ students.
features: Integrated secure Google Authentication, JWT-based authorization, and Razorpay payment gateway workflows.
Automated post-payment note delivery using the Google Drive API, enabling instant access to 4,000+ note modules.
Leveraged Google Analytics to track 200,000+ user events and support platform growth to 1,000+ monthly active users.
